title: Compact position cards — remove visual bloat
acceptance:
- No sparkline SVG rendered in any position card
- No probability track bar rendered in any position card
- No reasons tags row rendered in any position card
- PnL appears exactly once per card (in pos-badge-col)
- pos-stats shows exactly 3 boxes: Entry, Current, Confidence
- Cards are visually much shorter — roughly half the previous height
- No unrelated JS or CSS changed
